    public partial class MutableAllTypes
    {
        private AllTypes _record;

        /// <summary>
        /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="MutableAllTypes"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="record">The record to wrap.</param>
        public MutableAllTypes(AllTypes record)
        {
            _record = record;

            BoolValue = _record.BoolValue;
            ByteValue = _record.ByteValue;
            SByteValue = _record.SByteValue;
            CharValue = _record.CharValue;
            ShortValue = _record.ShortValue;
            UShortValue = _record.UShortValue;
            IntValue = _record.IntValue;
            UIntValue = _record.UIntValue;
            LongValue = _record.LongValue;
            ULongValue = _record.ULongValue;
            FloatValue = _record.FloatValue;
            DoubleValue = _record.DoubleValue;
            DecimalValue = _record.DecimalValue;
            StringValue = _record.StringValue;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="AllTypes"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        public AllTypes Build()
        {
            return _record with
            {
                BoolValue = this.BoolValue,
                ByteValue = this.ByteValue,
                SByteValue = this.SByteValue,
                CharValue = this.CharValue,
                ShortValue = this.ShortValue,
                UShortValue = this.UShortValue,

                UIntValue = this.UIntValue,
                LongValue = this.LongValue,
                ULongValue = this.ULongValue,
                FloatValue = this.FloatValue,
                DoubleValue = this.DoubleValue,
                DecimalValue = this.DecimalValue,
                StringValue = this.StringValue,
            };
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="AllTypes"/> to <see cref="MutableAllTypes"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator MutableAllTypes(AllTypes record)
        {
            return new MutableAllTypes(record);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="MutableAllTypes"/> to <see cref="AllTypes"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator AllTypes(MutableAllTypes mutable)
        {
            return mutable.Build();
        }

        public bool BoolValue { get; set; }
